name: Orange and Lemon Ice Box Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 7-inch spring form pan with lady fingers.
2. Cream the butter and sugar together until light and fluffy.
3. Add the egg yolks to the mixture and mix until well combined.
4. Stir in the orange juice and lemon juice.
5. Gently fold in the whipped cream, then add the beaten egg whites.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and chill until firm.
7. When ready to serve, loosen the sides of the pan to release the pudding.
8. Top with additional whipped cream before serving.
